query:
INSERT INTO position_requisitions (id, positionTitle, department, entity, employmentType, salaryMin, salaryMax, status, priority, description, requirements, responsibilities, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES 
(UUID(), 'Real Estate Manager (State A)', 'Real Estate', 'L.A.W.S. Collective', 'full_time', 85000, 115000, 'candidate_identified', 'high',
'Licensed real estate broker/agent responsible for closing transactions in State A jurisdiction. Manages property acquisitions, sales, and investment opportunities.',
'["Active real estate broker/agent license in State A", "5+ years real estate transaction experience", "Strong negotiation and closing skills", "Knowledge of investment property analysis", "Excellent client relationship management"]',
'["Close real estate transactions in State A jurisdiction", "Manage property acquisitions and sales", "Conduct market analysis and property valuations", "Negotiate terms and contracts", "Coordinate with title companies and lenders", "Mentor and supervise Real Estate Coordinators", "Build and maintain client relationships", "Ensure compliance with state real estate regulations"]',
NOW(), NOW())
command:

VALUES 
(UUID(), 'Real Estate Manager (State A)', 'Real Estate', 'L.A.W.S. Collective', 'full_time', 85000, 115000, 'candidate_identified', 'high',
'Licensed real estate broker/agent responsible for closing transactions in State A jurisdiction. Manages property acquisitions, sales, and investment opportunities.',
'["Active real estate broker/agent license in State A", "5+ years real estate transaction experience", "Strong negotiation and closing skills", "Knowledge of investment property analysis", "Excellent client relationship management"]',
'["Close real estate transactions in State A jurisdiction", "Manage property acquisitions and sales", "Conduct market analysis and property valuations", "Negotiate terms and contracts", "Coordinate with title companies and lenders", "Mentor and supervise Real Estate Coordinators", "Build and maintain client relationships", "Ensure compliance with state real estate regulations"]',
NOW(), NOW())
